title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 27 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 27/09/2022
Image reference: 2022-09-27_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-27-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulkers values have remained stable
Capesize Frontier Triumph (181,400 DWT, Jun 2012, Imabari) sold to Winning Shipping for USD 29.65 mil, VV Value USD 30.92 mil - BWTS fitted. Capesize Cougar (177,500 DWT, May 2002, Mitsui Ichihara) sold to unknown Turkish buyers for USD 13.85 mil, VV Value USD 12.81 mil. Panamax Buenos Aires (83,400 DWT, Dec 2011, Sanoyas) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 21.00 mil, VV Value USD 21.80 mil - BWTS fitted.
